Amplify ETFs Declares October Income Distributions for its Income ETFs
Amplify ETFs Declares September Income Distributions for its Income ETFs
Amplify ETFs Declares June Income Distributions for its Income ETFs
Amplify ETFs Changes Fund Name to Highlight 12% Option Income Strategy: Amplify Bloomberg U.S. Treasury 12% Premium Income ETF (TLTP)
Here's how ETF investors can lock in higher yields as Treasury rates jumped in October
Amplify ETFs Launches Targeted 12% Annual Option Premium Fixed Income ETF: Amplify Bloomberg U.S. Treasury Target High Income ETF (CBOE: TLTP)

overview.description: The Amplify TLT U.S. Treasury 12% Option Income ETF (TLTP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund uses a fund-of-fund approach to track an index that measures the performance of the iShares 20+ Year Treasury Bond ETF (TLT) and writes one-week expiration, at-the-money call options. The fund aims to generate a targeted annualized option premium income of 12% through covered call FLEX option contracts. TLTP was launched on Oct 29, 2024 and is issued by Amplify Investments.
infoTable: Bloomberg U.S. Treasury 20+ Year 12% Premium Covered Call 2.0 Index

data.title: Here's how ETF investors can lock in higher yields as Treasury rates jumped in October
data.text: Defined-maturity bond ladder ETFs could help investors lock in high yields and maturity dates to match their investment goals during periods of heightened market volatility.
